text-1: As a broker licensed in the EU, we’ve recently received a consultation paper from the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) informing us that they
text-1-strong: intend to impose the following measures
item-2: 2. Impose restrictions on CFDs, including Forex
text-2: We believe it is extremely important for our clients
text-2-strong: to be given the opportunity to share their views and opinions
text-2-2: on ESMA’s intended measures that would drastically change online trading as you know it.
text-3: That’s why we kindly ask you to
text-3-strong: complete the below form to give us your thoughts
text-3-2: on the matter. IQ Option will then collect all feedback from our clients and forward it to ESMA.
asterisk: This survey will take ~1-2 min to complete.
